title: Titan Series Plus™ 48'' Round European Plywood Folding Table
features: Standard 3/4" tabletop thickness easily accepts skirting
Polyurethane coating protects top and bottom
Vinyl bullnose edge securely glued and nailed
Thick 16 gauge powder coated steel legs
3/4'' thick tabletop with 13 layers of European plywood held together by Phenolic Glue.
Light brown protective stain is applied and triple sealed on top and bottom of table.
Moisture resistant and suitable for outdoor and indoor commercial use.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
